summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nucleo-vir Therapeutics enterprise portal. All 50 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend navigation, authentication flow, and UI interactions tested successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id field using {'_id': 0} projection
Session-based authentication working correctly with cookie and Authorization header support
Role-based access control properly implemented for Admin, HR, Employee, Accountant, CA roles
CORS configured correctly for cross-origin requests
seed_data_creation: Created test admin user and session via mongosh for testing protected routes. All test data cleaned up after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Google OAuth login flow redirects to auth.emergentagent.com, protected routes require authentication, dashboard displays stats and notifications, all CRUD operations for employees/projects/inventory/etc work correctly. Use auth_testing.md playbook to create test sessions for future testing.

authentication.google_oauth_redirect: PASS - Request Access button redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com
authentication.session_validation: PASS - /api/auth/me returns user data with valid session

dashboard.stats_display: PASS - Shows Total Employees, Pending Leave Requests, Open Tickets, etc.
dashboard.notifications: PASS - Notifications box displays announcements and pending requests
dashboard.quick_actions: PASS - Mark Attendance, Request Leave, Create Ticket, Request Material buttons present

attendance.search: PASS - GET /api/attendance/search with date filters works

navigation.all_menu_items: PASS - Dashboard, Work Assignments, Employees, Attendance, Leave Requests, Payroll, Payment Requests, Projects, Lab Notebook, Lab Inventory, Stationary Inventory, Equipment Schedule, Chat, Calendar, Helpdesk, Portal Guide
